news.t: Infrastructure Stocks Pop as Biden Signs the Spending Bill. Investors Should Focus on the Long Play.
Infrastructure-Stock Plays Are Here for the Long Term
3 Infrastructure ETFs to Capture Trillions in Spending

holdings.infoBox: NFRA is an equity ETF with a total of 210 individual holdings. The top holdings are SoftBank Group stock at 5.05%, Canadian Pacific Kansas City at 3.76%, Deutsche Telekom AG at 3.23%, Canadian National Railway Company at 3.09%, and Deutsche Post AG at 2.69%.

overview.description: The FlexShares STOXX Global Broad Infrastructure Index Fund (NFRA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global infrastructure companies from developed and emerging markets. NFRA was launched on Oct 8, 2013 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: STOXX Global Broad Infrastructure Index - Discontinued as of 29-Jan-2021

data.text: Stocks like builders of electric charging stations EVgo and Volta or suppliers of sand and asphalt like Vulcan and Martin Marietta Materials will be working on projects long after the supply and labor...

data.title: Infrastructure-Stock Plays Are Here for the Long Term
data.text: This week's infrastructure legislation—and rally in the stocks—is just a start. Analysts say that infrastructure projects will stretch many years in the future.

data.title: U.S. Chamber of Commerce CEO on infrastructure outlook
data.text: CNBC's "Squawk on the Street" team is joined by U.S. Chamber of Commerce CEO Suzanne Clark to discuss the infrastructure outlook, economic recovery and more.

data.title: ETFs to watch at amid bipartisan infrastructure deal
data.text: Tom Lydon, ETF Trends CEO, joins Yahoo Finance to discuss infrastructure ETFs amid Biden's announcement on infrastructure deal. Watch the 2021 Berkshire Hathaway Annual Shareholders Meeting on YouTube...

data.title: 3 Infrastructure ETFs to Capture Trillions in Spending
data.text: Congress will negotiate President Biden's $2.25 trillion infrastructure bill this summer. These infrastructure ETFs could benefit from the huge spending plan.

data.title: ETFs to watch as the economy moves toward reopening with ETF.com
data.text: Yahoo Finance's Alexis Christoforous and Kristin Myers discuss ETFs to watch with Cinthia Murphy, Managing Editor of ETF.com.
